tips_en: Start with Paper 1 (EvoArena/EvoMem) because the state-collapse problem it identifies is foundational and directly resonates with both other works: SpatialClaw's persistent IPython kernel and InterleaveThinker's Planner-Gen-Critic pipeline both implicitly rely on maintaining coherent, evolving state across multi-turn interactions—precisely the challenge EvoMem addresses via append-only patches. Reading it first will sharpen your lens for recognizing where memory versioning and evidence preservation could similarly improve spatial reasoning agents (Paper 3) and long-horizon multimodal generation (Paper 2).
tips_zh: 建议先读论文1（EvoArena/EvoMem），因为它所揭示的"状态坍缩"问题是基础性的，与另外两篇工作直接相关：SpatialClaw 的持久化 IPython 内核和 InterleaveThinker 的 Planner-Gen-Critic 流水线都隐含地依赖在多轮交互中维护连贯、可演化的状态——这正是 EvoMem 通过仅追加补丁（append-only patches）所解决的核心挑战。优先阅读它有助于你在后续阅读中更敏锐地识别：版本化记忆与证据保存机制如何同样能提升空间推理智能体（论文3）和长链路多模态生成（论文2）的性能。
